html:
The Red Gem is an Item used to craft several Magical items. It can be used to craft the Fire Staff, Night Light, Life Giving Amulet, and Purple Gem.

Red Gems can be obtained from Graves, as a drop from Red Hounds, from trading a Sextant to Wolly, from Earthquakes and Stalagmites in Caves, and from Ancient Statues, Broken Clockworks, and Ornate Chests in Ruins. They can also be found as a single, one time drop from hammering the Sunken Boat.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Red Gems have a 0.02% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Fishing with Trawl Net in deep Ocean has a small chance to catch a red gem. The chance is higher during Hurricane Season and Dry Season. Magma Piles in Magma Field biomes also have a chance to drop them.

In Hamlet, Red Gems can be obtained by hammering A Smashing Pot, killing the Pugalisk, trawling in the Lily Ponds, finding them atop pedestals in Ancient Pig Ruins, and mining the Petrified Eggs in the BFB's nest.

Gallery

  • Old Red Gem texture
  • Medal red emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

"redgem"
“It sparkles with inner warmth.”
–Wilson
“So pretty!”
–Willow
“Pretty rock.”
–Wolfgang
“Red like my heart's blood.”
–Wendy
“IT IS SLIGHTLY WARM”
–WX-78
“It is warm.”
–Wickerbottom
“I see within it the fiery death of a thousand trees.”
–Woodie
“Red brings fire.”
–Maxwell
“The geometric cut to this gem appears to optimally focus exothermic energy.”
–Wagstaff
“It is hot to the touch.”
–Wigfrid
“It feels warm even on the coldest nights.”
–Webber
“Booty-ful!”
–Walani
“A deep fire burns within.”
–Warly
“It gleams like th'sun!”
–Woodlegs
“ALL THAT GLITTERS 'TIS GOLD”
–Wilba
“Red shiny”
–Wormwood
“Still warm after its last use.”
–Wheeler
“Glitter doesn't really appeal to me.”
–Winona
“Deepest red, from golems bled.”
–Wortox
“It pretty and warm.”
–Wurt
“I think this gem might be magic.”
–Walter
“It's amazing how many gems you can find just lying around here.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngọc Đỏ là Vật phẩm dùng để chế tạo một số vật phẩm Phép thuật. Nó có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Gậy Lửa, Đèn ngủ, Bùa ban sự sống và Ngọc tím.

It can be used to craft the [[Fire Staff]], [[Night Light]], [[Life Giving Amulet]], and [[Purple Gem]]. Red Gems can be obtained from [[Grave]]s, as a drop from [[Red Hound]]s, from trading a [[Sextant]] to [[Wolly]], from [[Earthquake]]s and [[Stalagmite]]s in [[Caves]], and from [[Ancient Statue]]s, [[Broken Clockworks]], and [[Ornate Chest]]s in [[Ruins]]. They can also be found as a single, one time drop from [[hammer]]ing the Sunken Boat. __NOTOC__ == {{Pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, Red Gems have a 0.02% chance to be dropped by [[Tumbleweed]]s. In the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Fishing with [[Trawl Net]] in deep [[Ocean]] has a small chance to catch a red gem. The chance is higher during [[Hurricane Season]] and [[Dry Season]]. [[Magma Pile]]s in [[Magma Field]] biomes also have a chance to drop them. In ''[[Hamlet]]'', Red Gems can be obtained by hammering [[A Smashing Pot]], killing the [[Pugalisk]], [[Trawl Net|trawling]] in the [[Lily Pond|Lily Ponds]], finding them atop pedestals in [[Ancient Pig Ruins]], and mining the [[Petrified Eggs]] in the [[BFB]]'s nest. == {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Blue Gem |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Purple Gem }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Nightmare Fuel |count2 = 2 |item3 = Spear |tool = Shadow Manipulator |result = Fire Staff }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Nightmare Fuel |count2 = 2 |item3 = Gold Nugget |count3 = 8 |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Night Light }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Nightmare Fuel |count2 = 2 |item3 = Gold Nugget |count3 = 3 |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Life Giving Amulet }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Papyrus |count2 = 2 |tool = Shadow Manipulator |result = The End is Nigh |character = Wickerbottom }} {{Recipe |item1 = Spectoggles |item2 = Red Gem |result = Fryfocals |character = Wagstaff }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |tool = Pig Banker |result = Tenpiece Oinc |dlc = Hamlet }} {{Recipe |item1 = Red Gem |item2 = Cut Stone |count2 = 6 |item3 = Boards |count3 = 4 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Smelter |dlc = Hamlet }} == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Czerwone kryształy.png|Old Red Gem texture Red Gem emoji from official Klei Discord server.png|Medal red emoji from official Klei Discord server.
